mapper.select: SELECT ID, CHANGE_LOG_ID, CHANGE_FIELD, CHANGE_FIELD_NAME, OLD_VALUE, NEW_VALUE FROM E_M_EQPT_CHANGE_LOG_DETAIL WHERE CHANGE_LOG_ID = #{changeLogId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY ID
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO E_M_EQPT_CHANGE_LOG_DETAIL ( ID, CHANGE_LOG_ID, CHANGE_FIELD, CHANGE_FIELD_NAME, OLD_VALUE, NEW_VALUE, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )
SELECT #{item.id}, #{item.changeLogId}, #{item.changeField}, #{item.changeFieldName}, #{item.oldValue}, #{item.newValue}, 0, #{item.loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE FROM DUAL
